e53db8db-de1f-4b57-8831-7f513089142c.description: Follow map, reach shard before Varin. Ashfall thick, path shifts weekly.

objectives.target: Nyssara needs healing after veinrock splash. Find cure.

7f84add7-d995-4407-83fe-4b3a9dc87c87.title: Map of Salted Souls
7f84add7-d995-4407-83fe-4b3a9dc87c87.description: Follow map to vessel where souls move through salt wind; unlock path to Vorath's heart.

5e1cab01-c522-4869-aad3-359f053fbf4d.title: Fragment of Tide

72f58ed1-26a1-4ce3-984a-d559f34203f1.title: Zaltar's Purpose

objectives.target: Zaltar camps near Last Ember Ruin. Varin Lume knows why. Kaelen paid for truth. Find Varin before Lyra's patience ends.

4f53d81d-a54a-43d5-bd7d-257b02f4981c.title: The Veinrock Smuggling Accusation
